title: Ahmad Jamal — sprawling 2022-23 idea+todo dump (jazz, Web3, DAOs, dream-app, OSU grind)
html:
Ahmad Jamal — sprawling 2022-23 idea+todo dump

Source: 2022-10-25 Apple Note titled after Ahmad Jamal, but actually a 10-month rolling brain dump (Oct 2022 → Aug 2023). Jazz pantheon at the top, then collapses into CCC schemes, OSIG todos, ChatGPT product ideas, and rolling task lists.

TL;DR

  • Jazz starter list: Ahmad Jamal, Bill Evans, Louis Armstrong, Miles Davis, John Coltrane — Yahir's piano-jazz pantheon, the seed of his music-palate question to a friend at the bottom ("hey, what was the name of that underrated artist you listen to?").
  • Web3 idea spray: token-gated websites, digital passports/IDs (school/country/company), decentralized Wikipedia, "Mobile Web3 game, not marketed as web3 but as a regular game" — early pre-Austin product instincts. Plus DAO mergers as legal monopolization and "third party responsible for administration of DAOs??" (proto-DAO-ops idea).
  • Life-force frame: "Giving 100% at most efficient rate: 60mph = 20mpg (long term); 120mph = 10mpg" — early formulation of pacing as voluntary adversity's opposite. Also *"*spend you life force well".
  • ChatGPT product seeds: "talk to einstein, jobs, and jay-z through the principles… they have communicated"; "Advanced talking Tom, reduce loneliness… get advice from Steve Jobs Jesus etc"; the Dream App (record dream → ChatGPT condenses → image/video generated). 2022 idea, ahead of its season.
  • Mom-house promise restated: "Buy my mom a house" listed as the right kind of problem to solve, then immediately self-corrected: "^^need to revise this from $ based to mission and problem based to win" — the mom house goal reframed as mission.
  • Pitches in flight: Coinbase pitch grind for OSIG, DADCO thesis + slides, Ford Family transcripts, ELI internship list (PixelSpoke, Vacasa, Ride Report, The Dyrt, LegitScript, Cadmus, Airship — Portland/Oregon SaaS scan).
  • $PHIB memecoin: tokenomics, transaction swapping, mobile site, "figure out how to explode PHIB!!!" — first appearance of Yahir's only-named-memecoin project. Significant enough to stub.

Recurring strands

The note is the prototype of Yahir's — todos, ideas, quotes, names, all stacked. "Asking the right question will be the next best skill to have" is here, predating the standalone concept page.

Dad wisdom surfaces: "Impulse decision will kill you - dad." And the nonobvious hunt: "Seek nonobvious things", "What is non-obvious".

The trip-planning shows China / Consensus Austin as 2023 candidates — the China chapter is being weighed against a crypto-conference detour.

Key quotes

  • "Spend your life force well."
  • "Asking the right question will be the next best skill to have."
  • "Take existing things if equivalent value, but make them with 1/10 less resources and significantly cheaper."
  • "DAO mergers being a way to monopolize legally???"
